response.global_summary: A talk/MC segment featuring VTubers Kaela Kovalskia and Koseki Bijou during the Hololive 7th fes. 'Ridin' on Dreams' concert. The segment consists of audience interaction, discussion about the concert theme, and general banter. No full vocal songs are performed.

scenes.description: Kaela Kovalskia and Koseki Bijou greet the audience and interact with the crowd, asking about penlight colors.
The performers discuss the 'Ridin' on Dreams' concert theme and share their excitement with the audience.
The VTubers interact further with the crowd regarding their penlight colors and express appreciation for the audience's enthusiasm.
The performers transition to talking about the upcoming schedule and Monday, engaging the crowd in the conversation.
The segment concludes with closing remarks and final farewells to the audience.
